Home / Services / Electrical Installation

Electrical Installation

Professional electrical installation services for new construction and remodeling projects.

Whether you're building a new home in a growing Omaha suburb or remodeling your existing Dundee bungalow, proper electrical installation is crucial for safety, functionality, and code compliance. Bruce Kutler Electric provides comprehensive electrical installation services for residential and commercial properties. We work closely with homeowners, builders, and contractors to ensure that your electrical system meets your specific needs and adheres to all local regulations.

Our electrical installation services include wiring new homes, installing lighting fixtures, adding outlets and switches, upgrading electrical panels, installing dedicated circuits for appliances, and more. We use only high-quality materials and follow best practices to ensure lasting performance and safety. We understand the unique challenges posed by Omaha's climate, including the need for robust grounding systems to protect against lightning strikes during severe thunderstorms.

From planning and design to installation and inspection, Bruce Kutler Electric is your trusted partner for all your electrical installation needs. We'll ensure that your electrical system is safe, efficient, and ready to handle the demands of modern living.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Contact us to discuss your electrical installation needs and project scope.
  2. 02 Step 2: We'll develop a detailed plan and estimate based on your requirements.
  3. 03 Step 3: Our experienced electricians will complete the installation efficiently and according to code.
  4. 04 Step 4: We'll conduct a thorough inspection to ensure everything is working properly and safely.

Benefits

  • Safe and code-compliant installations
  • High-quality materials and workmanship
  • Customized solutions to meet your specific needs
  • Experienced electricians with years of installation expertise

Frequently Asked Questions

Do I need a permit for electrical installation work?

Yes, in most cases, electrical installation work requires a permit from the City of Omaha. We can handle the permit application process for you to ensure compliance with local regulations.

How long will the electrical installation take?

The duration of the installation depends on the scope and complexity of the project. We'll provide you with a realistic timeline during the planning phase.

Can you install energy-efficient lighting?

Absolutely. We offer a wide range of energy-efficient lighting options, including LED fixtures, that can help you save money on your energy bills and reduce your carbon footprint.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with electrical installation? Contact us today.
